cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14.0)

add_subdirectory(vst3sdk)

add_subdirectory(libsamplerate)

set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_INCLUDE_DIR "libsamplerate/${BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_INCLUDE_DIR}" PARENT_SCOPE)
set(BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_LIB_DIR "libsamplerate/${BARCELONA_REVERBERA_LIBSAMPLERATE_LIB_DIR}" PARENT_SCOPE)
